prose: Frontier orbital calculation on furan using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard') in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied furan.xyz (fixed, not re-optimized at this level). SCF converged in 9 cycles. No warnings. Integrity check: trustworthy=true, all checks passed. HOMO (index 17) = −6.3597638 eV, LUMO (index 18) = −0.1024036 eV. Headline result: HOMO–LUMO gap = 6.2573602 eV (Koopmans-style orbital gap, not a vertical excitation energy). Koopmans descriptors: vertical IP = 6.3598 eV, vertical EA = 0.1024 eV, electronegativity χ = 3.2311 eV, chemical hardness η = 3.1287 eV, chemical softness S = 0.3196 eV⁻¹, electrophilicity ω = 1.6684 eV. Total electronic energy: −230.11429 Hartree. 18 occupied orbitals out of 179 total.
